problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
hypothesis: Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity may resolve How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? by blocking at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
